Lab Setup Services

Designing Next-Gen
Innovation Labs

End-to-end STEM, AI and Robotics lab deployment with futuristic infrastructure, virtual experimentation platforms and scalable learning ecosystems.

Explore All Services ↓

Lab Ecosystem Includes

🔧

Hardware Infrastructure

Embedded boards, robotics kits, sensor arrays and mechanical innovation tools.

☁️

Virtual Simulation Stack

Cloud-based coding environments, digital twins and AI experimentation spaces.

👩‍🏫

Faculty Upskilling

Training programs, pedagogy integration and innovation mentoring workshops.

Complete Service Portfolio

Solutions For Every Institution

Lab Setup Services

🏆 ATL Competitions

🎓 Learning Management Systems (LMS)

📊 Continuous Assessments
🔨 Project-Based Learning
🏅 Competitions & Showcases

Innovation & Research Programs

10 service categories · tap to expand

01
Research Writing Services
▼
📄 Research Paper Writing (IEEE, Scopus, UGC)
🔍 Literature Review & Gap Analysis
📑 Review Papers & Survey Articles
🎓 Thesis & Dissertation (B.Tech, M.Tech, PhD)
📋 Research Proposal Writing
02
Data Analysis & Research Support
▼
🗂️ Data Collection & Preprocessing
📊 Statistical Analysis (Python, R, MATLAB)
📈 Result Interpretation & Visualization
📉 Graphs, Charts & Report Integration
03
Editing & Quality Improvement
▼
🔒 Plagiarism Checking & Removal
✍️ Paraphrasing & Rewriting
✅ Proofreading & Grammar Correction
📐 Formatting (IEEE, APA, MLA)
04
Publication Support
▼
📚 Journal Selection (Scopus, SCI, UGC)
📐 Paper Formatting as per Guidelines
📤 Paper Submission Support
🔄 Reviewer Comments & Revisions
Patent & Innovation Services
05
Idea Development & Innovation Support
▼
✅ Idea Validation & Feasibility Analysis
🎯 Problem Statement Identification
🗺️ Innovation Strategy & Roadmap
🔧 Prototype Planning
06
Patent Drafting Services
▼
🔎 Patentability Search (Novelty Check)
📜 Prior Art Analysis
📝 Patent Drafting (Provisional & Complete)
⚖️ Claims Writing
07
Patent Filing & Legal Support
▼
🇮🇳 Patent Filing (India & International – PCT)
📂 Documentation & Forms Preparation
⚖️ Support with Patent Agents / Attorneys
📩 Response to Examination Reports
08
Patent Research & Analysis
▼
🔍 Prior Art Search (Google Patents, Databases)
🗺️ Patent Landscape Analysis
🏢 Competitor Patent Analysis
📈 Technology Trend Analysis
09
Institutional Innovation Support
▼
🏫 Innovation & IPR Cell Setup
🎤 Patent Awareness Workshops
👩‍🎓 Faculty & Student Training on IPR
💡 Support for Hackathons & Challenges

📄 Technical Documentation
🚀 MVP Development
🧪 Testing & Validation Support

Deployment Packages

Starter Lab
